actual_household_coverage.rationale: Base centered on plan commitment 0.99 (DEFAULT); no plan-internal passage anchors a base shift. Low-side spread reflects stress-test forecasts: Selected Scenario satellite-hub failure 2-5% coverage drop and Risk 6 5-10% undercount of fluid populations. High capped near a hard saturation ceiling at 0.995.

expected_total_cost_crore.rationale: Megaproject CAPEX (multi-billion, multi-year, sovereign-scale). Plan ceiling 15000 crore; stress-test 'cost exceeding 15000 crore by >5%' anchors upper tail. Range straddles 12000-15000 stated band; triangular forced because Phase-8 lognormal sampler not yet implemented in run_monte_carlo (fat tails understated).

actual_provisional_release_months.rationale: Base centered on plan commitment 6 months (DEFAULT); no plan-internal passage anchors a base shift. High side reflects Risk 2 admin delays of 2-3 months in key states and Risk 4 monsoon timeline slippage of 4-8 weeks. Low side covers optimistic concurrent-processing execution.

actual_ingestion_mttr_hours.rationale: Base centered on plan commitment 4 hours (DEFAULT); no plan-internal passage anchors a base shift. High side anchored on Issue 3 sensitivity — MTTR breach causes 10-day supervisor review delay and 2-week salary delay. Spread is asymmetric reflecting one-sided overrun risk.

expected_contingency_draw_crore.rationale: Base anchored on Risk 5 device emergency procurement 400-600 crore. High side reflects compounding draws from satellite-hub overrun, paper-audit logistics, and security expansion against the single 750-crore pool. Low side covers benign execution with only minor remediation calls.

correlations.rationale: Risk 2 and Risk 4 both feed coverage shortfall AND schedule slip — monsoon grounding 3-5 weeks and admin delays 2-3 months degrade enumeration and push the provisional release together.
Risk 1 and Issue 3 forecast that pipeline failures (MTTR breach) trigger device-procurement, security, and audit drawdowns on the same 750-crore contingency pool.
